customer_message: My payment was deducted but my order was not placed. Please help urgently.
I have not received my order even after the expected delivery date.
I want to cancel my order because I placed it by mistake.
The product I received is damaged and I need a replacement immediately.
Can you tell me the status of my refund?
I cannot login to my account even after resetting my password.
Where can I update my delivery address?
This is my third complaint. My money is deducted and nobody is replying.
My order is late and I need it before tomorrow.
The item is broken and I am very disappointed with this service.
